zh.Cantref, Breconshire, Wales: 威爾士布雷康史爾坎崔福
zh.Cantref Selyf, Breconshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯布雷康史爾坎崔福
zh.of,Cantref Selyf,Breconshire,Wales: 英國威爾斯布雷康史爾坎崔福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwgan ap Llewelyn於1170年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾坎崔福時，他的父親Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf60歲，母親Joan verch Genillin41歲。他於1204年與Efa Pitcher在威爾士布雷康史爾坎崔福結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世在威爾士。

zh-hans.Cantref, Breconshire, Wales: 威尔士布雷康史爾坎崔福
zh-hans.Cantref Selyf, Breconshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯布雷康史爾坎崔福
zh-hans.of,Cantref Selyf,Breconshire,Wales: 英国威尔斯布雷康史爾坎崔福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwgan ap Llewelyn于1170年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾坎崔福时，他的父亲Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf60岁，母亲Joan verch Genillin41岁。他于1204年与Efa Pitcher在威尔士布雷康史爾坎崔福结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世在威尔士。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Gwgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Geoghegan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Eamon, Eamonn, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Eochagáin, a patronymic from the personal name Eochagán, a diminutive of Eochaidh, Eochaidhe ‘horseman’. Compare Caughey .

en.lifeSummary: When Gwgan ap Llewelyn was born in 1170, in Cantref, Breconshire, Wales, his father, Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf, was 60 and his mother, Joan verch Genillin, was 41. He married Efa Pitcher in 1204, in Cantref, Breconshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwgan ap Llewelyn est né en 1170, à Cantref, Breconshire, Galles, son père, Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Joan verch Genillin, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Efa Pitcher en 1204, à Cantref, Breconshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé à Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwgan ap Llewelyn 1170 in Cantref, Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf 60 und seine Mutter Joan verch Genillin 41. Er hat 1204 in Cantref, Breconshire, Wales Efa Pitcher geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb in Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwgan ap Llewelyn è nato il nel 1170 nel Cantref, Breconshire, Galles, il suo padre, Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Joan verch Genillin, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Efa Pitcher nel 1204, nel Cantref, Breconshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwgan ap Llewelynが1170年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアカントレフで生まれた時，父Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyfは60歳，母Joan verch Genillinは41歳であった。1204年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアカントレフでEfa Pitcherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼はウェールズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwgan ap Llewelyn(이)가 1170년 웨일스 브레콘실르 캔트레프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan verch Genillin(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1204년 웨일스 브레콘실르 캔트레프에서 Efa Pitcher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 웨일스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwgan ap Llewelyn nasceu em 1170, em Cantref, Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Joan verch Genillin, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Efa Pitcher em 1204, em Cantref, Breconshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwgan ap Llewelyn родился в 1170 г. в местности кантреф, брекуншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan verch Genillin, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Efa Pitcher в 1204 г. в местности кантреф, брекуншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в местности Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwgan ap Llewelyn nació en 1170, en Cantref, Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Joan verch Genillin, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Efa Pitcher en 1204, en Cantref, Breconshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en Gales.
